testcase.name: make_table_02_works
testcase.system-out:
Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(arm_var)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(arm_var))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: x 1. \-cardinalfda::make_table_02(df = adsl) at test-fda-table_02.R:11:3 2. +-gtsummary::remove_footnote_header(...) 3. +-gtsummary::add_overall(...) 4. | \-gtsummary:::check_class(x, "gtsummary") 5. \-gtsummary::tbl_summary(...) 6. +-cards::process_selectors(...) 7. \-cards:::process_selectors.data.frame(...) 8. \-cards:::imap(...) 9. \-cards:::map2(.x, names(.x) %||% seq_along(.x), .f, ...) 10. \-base::mapply(.f, .x, .y, MoreArgs = list(...), SIMPLIFY = FALSE) 11. \-cards (local) `<fn>`(dots[[1L]][[1L]], dots[[2L]][[1L]]) 12. \-cards::cards_select(...) 13. +-base::tryCatch(...) 14. | \-base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 15. | \-base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 16. | \-base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 17. \-tidyselect::eval_select(expr = expr, data = data, ...) 18. \-tidyselect:::eval_select_impl(...) 19. +-tidyselect:::with_subscript_errors(...) 20. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 21. \-tidyselect:::vars_select_eval(...) 22. \-tidyselect:::walk_data_tree(expr, data_mask, context_mask) 23. \-tidyselect:::eval_sym(expr, data_mask, context_mask)

testcase.name: make_table_02_works
